message: Hey everyone. I'm pumped today about our flash sale
You know it's been 53 years since the Beatles released Abbey Road right? My favourite album
53 years already?? Wow that makes me feel old...
Indeed! We're celebrating today by promoting a flash sale on retro items from 1969

Welcome to Bez's Beatles day, the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

 *Use `/help` at any time for a list of useful links and commands*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin Start button
Clicked Start button
We're a step closer to allowing folks to pay for items from the 1960s with Bitcoin thanks to Daniel!
Think of it like time travelling!
Wow good work Daniel! Looking forward to seeing it in action in prod
erm - funny you should say that Daniel, I'm just testing my checkout service change in prod and I can't complete the payment - something's up
Sorry Daniel it's not looking good on my end either
Uh oh...here we go again
@Anandaraj Mani can you "Size up the Issue" please and keep us informed
@Anandaraj Mani it's worth having a look at the changes made earlier today first
Get this sorted ASAP!!!
Hi Tanya can you please brief the issue in short?
:star: Qualify the problem
I will check things on my end and report in a few
Unable to do the payment right?
Correct
Thanks Tanya
Hi Shay
:bulb: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
Then i will create a P1 incident on this
P1
*Incident Number INC100085:* P1
:star: Incident record created
:star: Send first comms in first 5 minutes
Just saw the incident ticket come through, can someone tell me what's going on? This sale is huge for us
Traffic is high due to the flash sale, but nothing abnormal in CPU/memory usage
The Payments service health check is returning HTTP 504, and latency has spiked
Requests to the payments service are increasing, but the success rate dropped significantly around the time of Daniel's change
My change only introduced the crypto, which is not live yet. It shouldn't cause any problems with payments
Hi Bez Team is on it. Update here Thanks
Here's the detailed info on each of the changes made today
Hope this helps:<https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/ULPUBLIC/pages/1049559041/Bez+s+Beatles+day+Change+Request+logs>
Shall we check with Bob to see what's the customer impact?
Thanks Tanya for your investigation. If latency is more for the requests then it will be due to performance issue?
:bulb: Understand the problem by reproducing it
Thanks Shay
Hi Bob, What is the customer impact please?
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
It seems that it's something on our end and not network-related
Sure, let me look at my reports
Let me check the dashboard quickly Tanya
It's bad. We've started getting tickets from the EU region, customers saying they can't complete purchases, they get to the payment screen, but it fails to process
No new orders have been processed in the UK region for the last 10 minutes
UK is our biggest market, accounting for 35% of our user base
We've received over 380+ complaints in that time period, all with the same failure symptoms
Social media is picking up on it too, mentions on Twitter and Reddit saying 'Checkout is broken'
We're not seeing the issue outside the UK.  Other regions seem to be unaffected
How is our customers doing? Let's put out a post letting them know we are investigating
Thanks Bob. Tanya Shay anything did we go for the release/change with respective to the region specific?
Let me look into this deeper — I’ll try to replicate and check the logs
I will start with checking logs
:star: Reviewed changes
Let me take a look as well
The checkout service logs are healthy and are working as intended
Could it be your checkout change again @Shay? It broke the platform last week!
Any updates on the investigation?
Could we plaese check the error logs quickly
Please don't remind me @Daniel :cold_face:
The checkout service logs are healthy and the service is working as intended
If I'm correct, Bitcoin is only introduced to UK
Daniel as mentioned, shay changes still didn't go for the prod itseems
:star: Check changes done to the platform
Oh ok. Thanks Tanya
:bulb: keep the business informed regularly
Who is the right person on this to look into this Tanya
@Daniel
Honestly, I don't think this is coming from my change. The Bitcoin feature isn't even active yet, and the frontend hasn't been updated
Could this be load-related? It's a flash sale after all
Have we figured out the root cause yet?
Only UK market is affected. Still on it and come back here soon. Thanks Bez
I think i need to dig more into logs now
I see 504 HTTP errors in the payment service, which means the application is failing to serve the requests
Daniel, haven't you made a change to payments recently, right?
My change couldn't be an issue, it was to support crypto payment, although the code hasn't been invoked yet, so I doubt that's to do with it
Could Shay's change in Checkout be skipping some validation maybe?
Hi Shay please connect with Daniel and check please
We can start with checkout rollback
Any prod deployments went on checkout recently?
Yes, a few hours ago made i change
Please check the traffic yesterday at same time or last week same timestamp?
:star: Use metrics as evidence

Happy with checkout rollback
:bulb: Restoration over root cause analysis

Will do
:alarm_clock: - You have less than 5 minutes. You can type `/help` if you need any reminders.

rolling*

Only if you allow it
Please hold Daniel

:alarm_clock: - You have less than 2 minutes. You can type `/help` if you need any reminders.
@Daniel, you mentioned your change shouldn't be active. Can you confirm 100% that no shared code or libraries were modified?
I think we should rollback the payment change just to rule it out!
I can see that the error rate went up after the payment change was introduced to the system. Everything seems to be pointing at it
Where is the gap Tanya Daniel Shay
Shay Please go and roll back the payment changes asap
